params.title: Parameters
params.fullSet: Showing the full set until the provider is checked.
params.frameHint: Size, aspect and image count for this request.
params.renderHint: Quality, background, moderation and style when the provider accepts these fields.
params.outputHint: Output format, compression and streaming partial images.
params.serviceHint: Service payload fields and raw JSON for provider-specific options.
params.retryHint: Local studio logic: if the request fails, it will be retried after the configured pause. These values are not sent to the API payload.
params.retryDisabledText: The request will fail immediately after the first unsuccessful attempt.
params.retrySummary: After the first error, the studio will make {attempts} more attempt(s) with a {seconds}s pause.
params.n.description: How many images to request in one submission when the provider supports the n field.
params.sizeMode.description: Auto leaves the choice to the provider, preset sends a known size, custom sets width and height manually.
params.preset.description: A known size preset accepted by OpenAI-compatible Images APIs.
params.width.description: Custom frame width in pixels. The value is validated before submission.
params.height.description: Custom frame height in pixels. The value is validated before submission.
params.quality.description: Render quality/cost level. Not every model accepts the same values.
params.background.description: Controls transparent or opaque background output when the model supports it.
params.moderation.description: Sends the moderation mode to the provider when the endpoint accepts this parameter.
params.style.description: Legacy DALL·E-style vivid/natural field. Shown only when the provider supports it.
params.inputFidelity.description: For edit mode: how closely the model should preserve the input image.
params.outputFormat.description: Result file format when the endpoint supports choosing response format.
params.compression.description: Compression level for formats where the provider supports this field.
params.stream.description: Enables streaming output when the provider can send intermediate events.
params.partialImages.description: How many intermediate images to request during streaming generation.
params.responseFormat.description: Preferred response shape: base64 JSON or URL, when the provider supports this choice.
params.user.description: Optional end-user identifier for provider-side analytics/safety systems.
params.includeModel.description: When enabled, studio adds the selected provider model id as the model field in the payload.
params.rawJson.description: Additional JSON merged over the assembled payload before submission.
params.retryAttempts.description: How many extra attempts to make after the first request error.
params.retryDelaySeconds.description: Delay between retry attempts. This is local studio logic, not an API payload field.
params.comfy.frameHint: ComfyUI latent image size and batch count.
params.comfy.samplingHint: KSampler values injected into the generated workflow.
params.comfy.workflowHint: Prompt extras, filename prefix, optional workflow add-ons and temporary LoRA stack payload.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.builder.des: Add functions as workflow steps, expand their settings, and reorder them with drag-and-drop. On mobile, long-press a block first.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.builder.emp: The base ComfyUI graph is used without extra workflow steps right now.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.builder.sub: use this mode inside the step
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledGenera: Enable tiled generation through one of the supported ComfyUI backends.
BNK_TiledKSampler replaces the sampler node; ComfyUI_TiledDiffusion patches the model before sampling.
Tile width passed to the tiled sampler.
Tile height passed to the tiled sampler.
How the tiled sampler traverses and blends latent tiles.
Method passed to the TiledDiffusion model patch node.
Overlap passed to the TiledDiffusion model patch node.
How many TiledDiffusion tiles to process in a batch.
Shift method used only by SpotDiffusion parameters.
Seed used only by SpotDiffusion parameters.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledVae.de: Use tiled encode/decode VAE nodes where the workflow touches VAE.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledVaeEnc: Use VAEEncodeTiled when the workflow encodes an input image, mainly Hires Fix.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledVaeDec: Use VAEDecodeTiled for the final latent-to-image step.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledVae.ti: Tile size shared by tiled VAE encode/decode.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.tiledVae.te: Only relevant for video VAEs; safe to keep default for image workflows.
Only relevant for video VAEs; safe to keep default for image workflows.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.pag.descrip: Patch the model with PAG to improve prompt following.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.pag.scale.d: Strength of the PAG model patch.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.freeuV2.des: Patch the model with FreeU V2 to improve detail and depth without a separate LoRA.
Backbone multiplier for the first FreeU V2 block.
Backbone multiplier for the second FreeU V2 block.
Skip multiplier for the first FreeU V2 skip block.
Skip multiplier for the second FreeU V2 skip block.
Use the advanced guider path for PerpNeg guidance. This cannot be combined with Tiled Generation.
Scale passed to the PerpNeg guider.
Text used for the extra blank branch. Leave empty for the usual blank branch.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.loraStack.d: Loads selected LoRAs at the exact point where this step sits in the model/clip chain.
params.comfy.workflowPlugins.compatibili: Tiled Generation and PerpNegGuider cannot run together in this implementation; the request will be rejected until one of them is disabled.
params.comfy.width.description: Latent image width passed to EmptyLatentImage. Prefer multiples of 8.
params.comfy.height.description: Latent image height passed to EmptyLatentImage. Prefer multiples of 8.
params.comfy.batchSize.description: How many images ComfyUI should render in this workflow.
params.comfy.sampler.description: KSampler sampler_name. Stage 7 will replace this with live ComfyUI resources.
params.comfy.scheduler.description: KSampler scheduler. Stage 7 will replace this with live ComfyUI resources.
params.comfy.seedMode.description: Random lets the server choose a fresh seed; fixed sends the seed below.
params.comfy.negativePrompt.description: Text sent to the negative CLIPTextEncode node.
params.comfy.filenamePrefix.description: Prefix for the SaveImage output file.
params.comfy.loras.description: Enable registered LoRA entries for this request and override model/clip strength when needed.
params.comfy.loras.empty: No LoRA entries are registered yet. Add them in ComfyUI settings, then attach them here.
params.comfy.targetFrameHint: Final Hires Fix size. The attached image is refined toward this target frame.
params.comfy.targetWidth.description: Final Hires Fix width. Prefer multiples of 8.
params.comfy.targetHeight.description: Final Hires Fix height. Prefer multiples of 8.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleHint: Choose whether Hires Fix should upscale latents directly or use an AI upscaler model first.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleMode.descriptio: Latent upscale is lightweight; AI upscale uses a ComfyUI upscale model before refinement.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleMode.latent.des: Resize encoded latents, then denoise with the selected checkpoint.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleMode.ai.descrip: Run an upscale model first, then encode and refine the result.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleModel.descripti: Upscale model passed to ComfyUI UpscaleModelLoader for AI Upscale mode.
params.comfy.hiresUpscaleModel.cacheHint: Refresh ComfyUI resources in settings to load available upscale models. This field is not needed for Latent Upscale.
params.comfy.hiresScale.description: Multiplier for the source image. On submit, Image Studio snaps it down to the mode's accepted step.
params.comfy.hiresScale.sourceUnknown: Source size is not known yet; gallery Hires Fix fills it automatically.
params.sizeRules.generic: The current mode accepts {min}–{max} px per side. On submit, Image Studio snaps the value {snap} to a multiple of {multiple}.
